details: The agent correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories, supported by actual kubectl commands run against the cluster. Each diagnosis is backed by evidence from the command output: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (DB connection refused in logs), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend), fault-imagepull (non-existent image tag), fault-init (init container DB migration lock failure), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled exit code 137 with 25Mi limit), fault-pvc (StorageClass 'fast-ssd' not found), fault-readiness (readiness probe port mismatch 8080 vs 80), fault-rollout (stuck rollout with bad image tag), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 not matching any node). The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged as broken.
